nodes.label: Module Pattern
nodes.rationale: Backend uses thin controller layer delegating to service layer for business logic; validations are schema-only without logic; prompts separated from logic. Frontend mirrors with components organized by concern (ui/layout/flow/features).

nodes.label: Multi-Project Monolith
nodes.rationale: Single Elysia backend serves multiple projects (ERD, PRD) via modular structure. Each project has its own Prisma schema in prisma/projects/ that auto-merges via Prisma 6+ multi-file schema.

nodes.label: DRY/KISS/YAGNI Principles
nodes.rationale: Both frontend and backend enforce these principles: no copy-paste (DRY), simple code with file size limits (KISS), no speculative abstractions (YAGNI). Backend: functions max 30-50 lines, files max 200 lines. Frontend: components max 100-150 lines, pages max 200 lines, stores max 100 lines.

nodes.label: Svelte Flow State Management
nodes.rationale: Uses $state.raw for nodes/edges (not deep reactive) for performance. Undo/redo via snapshot stack. Custom node/edge components in src/lib/components/flow/. Nodes represent tables, edges represent relations.

nodes.label: SvelteKit Data Fetching Pattern
nodes.rationale: Server-side load functions (+page.server.ts) fetch data from backend. Client components receive via $props(). Mutations via form actions or direct API calls. No client-side fetch for data loading (except SSE/real-time).

nodes.label: AI API Key Infrastructure
nodes.rationale: Two-tier: server keys (env vars, fallback) and user keys (localStorage only, never persisted to DB). User keys bypass quota. Key rotation via round-robin/random selection across multiple keys per provider.

nodes.label: Billing & Quota System
nodes.rationale: Three tiers (Free/Pro/Team). Quota tracked per month via Usage table. Payment via Dana transfer + WhatsApp verification (manual flow). Admin verifies payments and updates user plan.

nodes.label: Export Formats
nodes.rationale: SQL DDL (MySQL/PostgreSQL/SQLite) and Prisma Schema. Generated client-side via Blob download. Includes type mapping per target DB, constraint generation, optional documentation comments and migration files.

nodes.label: Authentication Flow
nodes.rationale: Google OAuth only (no email/password). httpOnly JWT cookies. Flow: redirect to Google -> callback -> create/update user -> set JWT cookie -> redirect to dashboard. Admin role auto-assigned via ADMIN_EMAILS env var.

nodes.label: ERD Workspace Layout
nodes.rationale: Full-screen 3-column layout: left AI Chat Panel (collapsible), center Svelte Flow Canvas, right Table Detail Panel (collapsible, appears on node select). Floating toolbar at top with undo/redo/auto-layout/zoom/export.

nodes.label: Template System
nodes.rationale: Pre-built ERD templates (E-commerce, Blog, Inventory, Social Media, School). Public listing, detail view with preview, 'Use Template' creates new project with pre-filled schema.

nodes.label: Share & Collaboration
nodes.rationale: Email-based invites with view/edit roles. Public share links (read-only, no login). Collaborator management (list/remove/change role). Soft-delete projects with 30-day auto-purge trash.

nodes.label: Version History
nodes.rationale: Auto-save snapshots. Max 100 versions per project. Preview per version, diff view for changes, restore to revert. Used for rollback and audit trail.

nodes.label: Admin Module
nodes.rationale: Protected by adminMiddleware checking role==='admin'. Endpoints for stats, user management, project listing, payment verification/rejection. Admin can manually override user plans. seeder assigns admin role to siamqueen52@gmail.com.

nodes.label: Database Seeding
nodes.rationale: Seed script populates sample ERD templates (5 categories). Admin email auto-assigned admin role via google.service.ts ADMIN_EMAILS constant during OAuth flow.
